---
title: "\'The Worms of the North\'"
---

## \'The Worms of the North\'

**Author:** Susanna Warren
**Date:** 1861
**Imprint:** <i>MP</i> (October 1861) 361-377.

### Notes

This unsigned article is attributed to Warren on the assumption that it is referred to as \'your Dragons\'.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
